spec_match.rationale: The checkout calls the real same-origin payment handler, separates AbortError from OperationError, and only opens the fallback request after a new Pay click.

interactive.rationale: Outcome selectors, setup controls, primary and fallback method buttons, basket persistence, and success/cancel/retry/fallback-error panels all update from user-driven PaymentRequest calls.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes the expanded retry flow, including fresh-click fallback, fallback cancellation, fallback failure, and sessionStorage basket preservation.

edge_cases.rationale: The page covers fallback also failing, user cancellation during fallback, the fresh user-activation requirement for a second show(), and err.message display for both attempts.

design_system.rationale: Emoji and glyph icons were replaced with inline SVG, colors use shared variables, and selected button states set both background and color.

summary: The smart retry demo now demonstrates the retry cap and fresh-gesture rule instead of assuming an always-successful fallback, while preserving basket state and exposing the handler error message.
